privileged_info_summary: The task 'rect_select_fill@1' has no explicit metadata field in task.json. The task downloads real landscape images from Unsplash's authenticated CDN: primary image (photo ID 1506905925346, 800x600 JPEG at quality 80, 69,852 bytes) and fallback image (photo ID 1441974231531, 800x600 JPEG, 166,986 bytes). Both images were verified to be authentic Unsplash photographs. The data is non-synthetic, coming from a public source; synthetic image generation via ImageMagick is only a fallback. Task verifier checks for red rectangle (15-50% of image area, centered, RGB values with R>200) added to the image.
